title: Derp's Flint Tools
description: A simple mod adding flint tools to the game
body: A simple mod adding flint tools to the game. This mod also removes the recipes for wood and stone tools, to force the flint tools into progression. To make the tools, right click a stone block with flint to get flint peices, which you can combine with a stick to get a flint knife. Breaking grass with that knife has a chance to drop grass pecies, which can be combined into grass fiber, allowing you to get a pickaxe and axe.
